story.logline: The tenth stamp on a cafe loyalty card briefly reveals the small human rituals behind every return.
story.dramaticQuestion: Is loyalty a discount, or the accumulation of being remembered?

beats.title: Impact
beats.purpose: Stop the scroll with a physical event.

beats.title: Memory stack
beats.purpose: Replace generic reward language with observed behavior.

beats.title: Loop
beats.purpose: Return to the stamp with a changed meaning.

scenes.title: Counter ritual
scenes.purpose: Turn one stamp into accumulated relationship evidence.

shots.title: The impact hook
shots.intent: Deliver a first-second tactile hook built for a vertical feed.
shots.subject: Inez driving a red rubber stamp onto Dev's worn loyalty card
shots.action: the tenth stamp lands hard enough to kick a ring of coffee dust across the counter
shots.environment: tight cafe counter with espresso machine rising through the vertical background

camera.movement: fast three-inch drop with the stamp, then immediate snap tilt to the exchanged look
camera.framing: stamp impact fills lower vertical third, faces stack above it
camera.focusBehavior: impact plane sharp, then rapid rack to Inez and Dev

physics: paper card flexes against the counter
coffee dust travels outward then settles

beats.action: stamp enters fast and hits the tenth square
coffee dust ring expands while the card flexes
camera snaps to Inez and Dev sharing the smallest knowing look

continuityLocks: same worn card with nine existing red stamps
same green apron and charcoal raincoat
same red stamp remains in Inez's right hand
imperfectionAnchors: card corners are softened from pocket wear
stamp ink is denser on one edge
espresso steam briefly veils one face

shots.title: What the card remembers
shots.intent: Compress three specific return rituals into a loopable payoff.
shots.subject: the stamped card held upright between Inez and Dev
shots.action: three reflections pass across its glossy ink: umbrella rescued, order remembered, bad day recognized
shots.environment: same cafe counter with rain tracking down the front window

camera.movement: slow quarter-orbit around the card while reflected memory beats replace one another
camera.framing: card centered, faces remain soft but identifiable on opposite sides
camera.focusBehavior: focus stays locked on the fresh stamp while reflections change

lighting.motivation: moving exterior reflections over wet ink

physics: wet ink sheen changes only with viewing angle
card stays rigid between two fingers
reflections follow the curved clear tape over the card

beats.action: reflection shows Inez returning Dev's dripping umbrella
reflection shows his usual cup already waiting before he speaks
reflection shows Inez silently adding an extra biscuit on a bad morning
fresh stamp fills frame and matches the opening impact position for a clean loop

continuityLocks: same card, stamp count, tape repair, and finger positions
same green apron and charcoal raincoat
imperfectionAnchors: fresh ink has a tiny unprinted pinhole
clear tape edge catches one hard highlight
thumbnail has a faint espresso stain

soundDesignDirectives: final stamp thump matches opening frame

shots.onScreenText: TEN VISITS. ONE PLACE THAT NOTICED.
